findings.evidence: Calls open() directly to write data/report.json, bypassing the Repository class. CLAUDE.md explicitly forbids any module other than Repository from calling open() on a data file. The fix is to use Repository.save() instead of the raw open/json.dump block.
os.makedirs call is also a bypass side-effect of not using Repository; Repository.save() already handles directory creation internally.
Test exercises the bypassing code path and would need updating once export_report is rewritten to accept an injected Repository (similar to how test_stats.py uses FakeRepo).
